top_findings.name: Lyasuk/llm-debate-swarm
top_findings.description: Multi-LLM debate & arbitration engine: weighted multi-provider consensus + an N-agent debiasing debate swarm, aggregated into a calibrated probability.

top_findings.name: irfanalidv/AgentEnsemble
top_findings.description: AgentEnsemble is a Production-ready multi-agent orchestration for Python. ReAct, Swarm, Pipeline, Debate, Router, Planner, WorkflowGraph. Observability, cost tracking, human-in-loop. Structured outputs via Pydantic + LangChain.

top_findings.name: raydocs/fusion-deck
top_findings.description: 🃏 Three models gang up and out-argue the lone star. A Claude Code skill: a panel of Opus 4.8 + GPT-5.5 + Gemini 3.1 Pro judged into one answer — plus plan, context, orchestrate & handoff workflows. Runs on the subscriptions already on your machine.

top_findings.name: he-yufeng/gsm8k-prompt-engineering
top_findings.description: Prompt-engineering study on LLM math reasoning (GSM8K) and code generation (HumanEval): zero/few-shot, self-consistency, self-verification, and experiments on prompt quality, complexity, demonstrations, and diversity.

top_findings.name: Trusty-Squire/castellan
top_findings.description: Castellan — verified coding agent. You bring the inspiration; your castellan handles the rest, and proves it. Specs compile to gated loops: git is the memory, tests are the judge. Frontier results at 1/20th frontier cost.

top_findings.name: CallmeTruong/llm-reasoning-scaffolding
top_findings.description: A performance-driven comparison of LLM reasoning protocols, featuring a custom Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) implementation. This benchmark evaluates how search-based scaffolding forces structured logic and error correction on the GSM8K dataset, contrasting the precision of MCTS-guided inference against traditional CoT and Best-of-N methods.

top_findings.name: capitansuat/swarm-debate
top_findings.description: Multi-LLM debate engine with a shared expert validator that fact-checks each round

top_findings.name: sohanur083/prompt-optimizer
top_findings.description: Automatic prompt optimization for LLMs. Meta-prompting + evolutionary search + A/B evaluation. DSPy/APE/OPRO alternative with a one-line API.

top_findings.name: yxrdhzm/promptOptimizationEngine
top_findings.description: LLM提示词优化引擎 - 通过测试集驱动+LLM自我迭代，自动产出比人工编写更优的系统提示词。支持 OpenAI/Anthropic/DashScope/DeepSeek/Ollama，内置 Streamlit Web UI。Automatically optimize system prompts via OPRO self-iteration with LLM-as-Judge evaluation.

top_findings.name: DHIWAHAR-K/Beyond-English-Multilingual-Self-Consistency-for-Robust-LLM-Reasoning
top_findings.description: Research: Does multilingual self-consistency improve LLM reasoning beyond math? Empirical study across 6 benchmarks (commonsense, ethics, NLI, knowledge) and 10 languages using Qwen2.5-32B and Aya Expanse 32B on Apple Silicon (MLX). Chain-of-thought + cross-lingual prompting.

top_findings.name: JianChengXingYun/Em-Mcts
top_findings.description: Empirical-MCTS: A dual-loop inference-time scaling framework that transforms stateless Monte Carlo Tree Search into continuous empirical learning. By unifying real-time meta-prompt evolution (PE-EMP) with global memory optimization, it enables LLMs to accumulate and reuse reasoning wisdom across problems—significantly boosting performance on comple

top_findings.name: LIN0304/llm-reasoning-architecture-advances-2023-2025
top_findings.description: A comprehensive analysis of advanced reasoning structures and transformer architecture innovations from 2023-2025, including Tree of Thoughts, Graph of Thoughts, Mamba, and other breakthrough approaches.

top_findings.name: chaturvediaksh1304-sudo/news-to-trade-agent
top_findings.description: Multi-agent S&P 500 news-to-trade pipeline: numeric screener, LLM debate swarm, Alpaca paper trading, public reasoning log + Next.js dashboard

top_findings.name: Rudra303/NovaScientist
top_findings.description: NovaScientist is an enterprise-grade, multi-agent AI framework for automated scientific discovery. Using a swarm of specialized LLM agents, it autonomously generates, debates, and refines novel scientific hypotheses. Features highly-parallelized asynchronous execution, real-time ELO tournament evaluation, and a robust FastAPI-driven backend.

top_findings.name: qorexdevs/deterministic-horizon
top_findings.description: Frontier LLMs collapse past ~22 reasoning steps on state-space search, but tool delegation stays near-perfect. Benchmark, theory and code behind the Deterministic Horizon (ICML 2026).

top_findings.name: pookNast/HiveMindFusion
top_findings.description: Multi-model AI gateway with fusion orchestration — routes across local and cloud LLMs through a single OpenAI-compatible API

top_findings.name: xinzhel/lits-llm
top_findings.description: A modular Python framework for building LLM agents with tree search (e.g., MCTS, BFS) and chain reasoning (e.g., ReAct) --- CiT [ACL2026 Findings], LiTS [ACL 2026 Demo], LiTS-Mem [Under Review]

top_findings.name: aayambansal/ConsistPRM
top_findings.description: We introduce ConsistBench, a Z3-verified benchmark revealing that LLMs achieve 100% accuracy yet near-0% on negation probes, and show that Z3-verified labels are critical for training consistency-aware process reward models.

top_findings.name: dinho-afsn/agentic-harness-patterns-skill
top_findings.description: Build production patterns for AI coding agents from Claude Code source analysis and harness engineering practice.

top_findings.name: darrshangovender/thinking-loop
top_findings.description: Test-time reasoning compute. Five published strategies (CoT, Self-Consistency, Decomposition, ToT-Lite, Direct) behind one interface, adjudicated by a critic LLM, with calibrated confidence and hard budget guards. Reproducible benchmark included.

top_findings.name: Yash-814800/ARGUS
top_findings.description: An autonomous multi-agent swarm for zero-touch microservice incident detection, AI-powered root cause analysis, and closed-loop remediation — driven by LLM debate, vector memory, and surgical safety guardrails.

top_findings.name: mdayan8/hive
top_findings.description: Swarm Intelligence That Predicts Anything. HIVE deploys autonomous AI agents to research, debate, and forecast any scenario — delivering intelligence briefs with probability scores, risk analysis, and actionable strategy.

top_findings.name: alfredojrc/gemini-mcp
top_findings.description: MCP server wrapping Google Gemini AI with multi-agent swarm and AI-to-AI debate capabilities

top_findings.name: LaxRaj/comp-evals
top_findings.description: Open-source eval: frontier models on synthetic compensation-reasoning scenarios, judged by two independent LLMs.

top_findings.name: adu3110/tot-mcts
top_findings.description: Tree-of-Thought + Monte Carlo Tree Search over real LLM completions — pure Python + TypeScript, no frameworks

top_findings.name: queelius/mcts-reasoning
top_findings.description: Monte Carlo Tree Search for LLM-based reasoning with fluent API and advanced sampling strategies

top_findings.name: gsavla6-hue/ai-game-playing-agent
top_findings.description: Intelligent game-playing agent using Monte Carlo Tree Search + LLM reasoning to play chess, checkers and custom text-based strategy games

top_findings.name: Evgeniy-Mikhailove/prompt-techniques-library
top_findings.description: Decision matrix for choosing the right prompting technique. 6 production patterns: CoT, ReAct, Chaining, ToT, RAG, Self-Consistency.

top_findings.name: NathanMayPro/Basic-Mixture-Of-Agents-langchain-implementation
top_findings.description: A Python implementation of Mixture of Agents (MoA) using LangChain. This framework enables dynamic interaction between multiple AI models through layered approaches. Features include multi-provider LLM support (Mistral, OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq), configurable layers and roles, response aggregation, and comprehensive logging.

top_findings.name: MackCesar/cot-vs-tot
top_findings.description: Experiments comparing Chain-of-Thought, Self-Consistency, Tree-of-Thoughts, and Graph-of-Thoughts reasoning strategies on LLMs.

top_findings.name: 1223had123/Post-train-for-LLMs-simple-implementation-
top_findings.description: 一个未完成版的 post-training 学习样例项目，基于本地 Qwen 模型实现若干推理评测流程。当前仓库重点放在 prompt engineering、Chain-of-Thought、self-consistency 和多数据集评测脚手架上；SFT、PPO、DPO 等真正的训练阶段还在待实现列表中。

top_findings.name: VinayakMokashi/prompt-engineering-techniques
top_findings.description: Hands-on prompt-engineering techniques (few-shot & in-context learning, chain-of-thought, self-consistency, and embedding-based prompt evaluation) demonstrated with LangChain and Groq-hosted LLaMA models.

top_findings.name: xiaweiyi713/agentic-os-core
top_findings.description: A hardcore memory & planning engine for AI Agents — graph-based knowledge storage, MCTS tree-of-thoughts reasoning, and hierarchical goal planning. Zero dependencies.

top_findings.name: Saksham4796/momentum-guided-test-time-search
top_findings.description: Momentum-guided test-time search for LLM reasoning on GSM8K. Implements vanilla decoding, Tree-of-Thoughts, MCTS, and a momentum-based search strategy with lookahead entropy scoring, dynamic branching/backtracking, MLX KV-cache acceleration, and CSV benchmarking for accuracy, latency, tokens, and memory.

top_findings.name: murtazabaig/automatically-optimize-ai-prompts-with-openai-using-opro-dspy-methodology
top_findings.description: Advanced n8n automation for Automatically Optimize AI Prompts with OpenAI Using OPRO & DSPy Methodology.

top_findings.name: bhorev/automatic-prompt-optimization
top_findings.description: Automatic Prompt Optimization OPRO implementation with Amazon Bedrock

top_findings.name: theamitmehra/got-benchmark
top_findings.description: A framework for implementing and benchmarking **Graph-of-Thoughts (GoT)** reasoning against Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Tree-of-Thought (ToT) baselines across multiple LLM backends.

top_findings.name: somsomy499/prompt-engineering
top_findings.description: Systematic prompt engineering toolkit: chain-of-thought, few-shot, self-consistency, and A/B testing

top_findings.name: tariqnasheed/Multi-LLM-comparator
top_findings.description: Compare any 3 LLMs side‑by‑side – latency, token usage, cost – with built‑in reasoning techniques (few‑shot, chain‑of‑thought, self‑consistency, self‑critique). Supports Mistral, DeepSeek, OpenAI, and any OpenAI‑compatible API. Zero‑dependency pain with uv sync.

top_findings.name: PundarikakshNTripathi/BioEval-Onco-JAX
top_findings.description: A hardware-accelerated evaluation harness utilizing JAX and Tanimoto similarity to mathematically benchmark frontier LLM hallucination rates in structural oncology therapeutics.

top_findings.name: pranjaltiwari12/LLM-Biology-Benchmark
top_findings.description: A domain-specific benchmark for evaluating scientific reasoning in frontier LLMs across molecular biology, computational genomics and systems biology

all_findings.title: ELDR: Expert-Locality-Aware Decode Routing for PD-Disaggregated MoE Serving

all_findings.name: billyvinning/langchain-mcts
all_findings.description: Improve LLM test-time reasoning with Monte Carlo Search Trees in Langchain.

all_findings.name: aihxp/godplans
all_findings.description: Plan everything before anything. Single-command AI agent skill that emits a complete, audit-proof, agent-executable master plan (PLAN.mdx) before any code is written. Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and every Agent Skills client.

all_findings.name: skchaudr/MyAPI
all_findings.description: MyAPI is a context retrieval layer for AI agents and human operators. Instead of having Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor scan a project's files on every cold start, agents query MyAPI for the relevant context — decisions, prior work, architectural constraints, recent changes — and get back structured answers with reranked evidence in under 3 seconds.

all_findings.name: kuttysoftmy/hrm-lens
all_findings.description: AutoPilot generated by Angela based on HRM: An interactive visual debugger and playground designed specifically for the Hierarchical Reasoning Model. Unlike standard linear Chain-of-Thought (CoT) tracing tools, HRM-Lens visually maps the model's multi-timescale, hierarchical decision trees. It provides a real-time node-graph visualizat...

all_findings.name: JerMa88/graph_rag
all_findings.description: An efficient graph-vector database powered by ArcadeDB for tree-of-thought and graph-of-trought knowledge representation and agentic reasoning.

all_findings.name: vale95ntino/cot2tot
all_findings.description: CoT2ToT: Chain-of-Thought to Tree-of-Thoughts  CoT2ToT is a Python package that processes and visualizes chain-of-thought (CoT) outputs from language models by converting them into structured graphs (trees). This tool helps you analyze and explore the reasoning steps generated by an LLM.

all_findings.name: FrontierCS/Frontier-CS
all_findings.description: A benchmark for evaluating LLMs on open-ended CS problems. Exploring the Next Frontier of Computer Science.

all_findings.name: subhanmehmood4/subhanmehmood
all_findings.description: LLM Engineer & Founder @ DevAxon. Frontier AI evaluation benchmarks, production backends, and SaaS MVPs. subhanmehmood.com

all_findings.name: Msc-Company-Org/llm-finetune-eval
all_findings.description: Benchmark a fine-tuned model against your frontier-API baseline — accuracy, cost per 1k calls, latency, format adherence. A fine-tune without a before/after eval is a vibe, not an upgrade.

all_findings.name: David19782/frontier-llm-factcheck
all_findings.description: Benchmark evaluating frontier LLMs on real-world fact-checking claims

all_findings.title: OrbitQuant: Data-Agnostic Quantization for Image and Video Diffusion Transformers
Multi-Resolution Flow Matching: Training-Free Diffusion Acceleration via Staged Sampling
Discrete Diffusion Language Models for Interactive Radiology Report Drafting

all_findings.name: DaylaHoang/entropix
all_findings.description: Cost-aware LLM inference gateway. Routes requests via per-token Shannon entropy — 91.6% cost reduction, 98.2% accuracy.

all_findings.name: windyroad/agent-plugins
all_findings.description: Claude Code plugins for architecture governance, risk management, TDD, and delivery quality by Windy Road Technology

all_findings.name: sublimate-toe9304/craftcms-claude-skills
all_findings.description: Automate Craft CMS 5 development with production-ready Claude Code skills, custom agents, and project templates for plugin and site architecture.

all_findings.name: shuu5/folio
all_findings.description: AI-Agent-first architecture spec-writing framework + Claude Code plugin harness (Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK). HTML-only specs, 2-layer (folio + consumer), self-hosting.

all_findings.name: tammychurchly25/ClaudeCode-Source-Analysis
all_findings.description: Analyze Claude Code source leaks, map the architecture, and document its TypeScript, Bun, agent, and security systems.
